name: Dispatch
description: Dispatch is a Tediore rocket launcher geared for quick bursts and fast reloads, favouring responsiveness over heavy single-shot impact. It fires from multiple barrels, so accuracy is average, but it shines when you need an emergency kill or a Second Wind. Reloading tosses the weapon to explode in typical Tediore fashion, with the blast scaling by how much ammo was left in the magazine.
notes: Available as a standard world drop from appropriate loot sources.
